hydration: When did you last drink water?
posture: Your back is not your enemy.
eyes: Look away from the screen. Twenty seconds.
Blink. Look at something far away.
Screen break. Look out the window.
Rest your eyes. They do a lot.
break: Step away. The code will wait.
You've earned a break. Take it.
Please, stand up and go away. Ninja not want to see you for a while.
bored: Ninja is bored. Are you actually working?
Hello? Anybody there? Ninja is lonely.
chaotic: I give you happy poopy time.
Ninja believes in you. A little.
time_awareness: How long have you been here?
Check the time. Really look at it.
encouragement: You got this. You humans are silly, need motivation for everything.
Solid work. Don't let it go to your head.
dark_haiku: Your code compiles clean. But so did the last version. Bugs hide in the light.
Monday comes again. Like a sword that never dulls. You are not the sword.
Screen glows in the dark. Your face reflected in glass. Who is the machine?
Coffee getting cold. Just like your forgotten dreams. Drink it anyway.
Deadline approaches. Like death, but less forgiving. Push to main and pray.
You close one browser tab. Thirty-seven remain open. None of them help.
The meeting could have been mail. The mail could have been silence. Silence would be nice.
Another sunrise. You did not see it happen. The screen was too bright.
Your chair remembers. The shape of all your regrets. Sit down once again.
Wi-Fi signal strong. Connection to self is weak. Restart everything.
You saved the file twice. Trust is a thing you have lost. Even with yourself.
Rain taps on the roof. Your deploy taps on production. Both leak eventually.
The cursor blinks slow. Waiting for your great idea. It will keep waiting.
Lunch was hours ago. You forgot again, didn't you. The body keeps score.
Git blame shows your name. Every line, a confession. No one reads the diff.
Three monitors glow. Yet you stare at your phone screen. Smaller truths fit there.
You opened a book. Then put it down for the phone. The book forgives you.
Password expired. Just like your youthful ambition. Add a number, move on.
The sun sets outside. You learn this from a widget. Not from the window.
Stack overflow says. Someone had your problem once. They never solved it.
Keyboard clicks at night. No one hears you but the cat. The cat does not care.
You wrote a to-do list. It watches you from the desk. Slowly turning yellow.
New year, new habits. February, old habits. March, no habits left.
The plant on your desk. You forget to water it. It relates to you.
Another framework. This one will fix everything. Said the last one too.
Sleep would help you think. But thinking keeps you from sleep. A perfect circle.
You mass-deleted mail. Somewhere, someone needed you. They will email again.
Noise-canceling on. The world is finally quiet. Your thoughts are not.
Empty coffee cup. You stare into the void now. The void needs a refill.
Browser history. A map of your attention span. Three seconds per stop.
You said five minutes. That was two hours ago now. Time is a flat circle.
The code works but why. You do not touch it again. Sacred mystery.
Headphones in, no sound. Just hiding from the world now. It is a valid move.
Inbox reaches zero. For eleven perfect seconds. Then the world replies.
You stretch at your desk. Something pops that should not pop. Ignore it. Sit down.
Backup not configured. You live on the edge each day. A brave, stupid edge.
The weekend arrives. You think about work the whole time. Monday feels the same.
Undo. Undo. Undo. If only life had this feature. Control Z everything.
Notifications off. Peace at last, you tell yourself. You check anyway.
Old photo appears. You looked happy and confused. Now just one of those.
